entry.title: glyphdown
entry.content: Two-register prompting convention for Claude Code: dense ASCII form for internal reasoning, normal prose for user-visible output. Default deterministic codec + opt-in own-trained ML sidecar (no API key, no vendor). Ships a skill, UserPromptSubmit + PreCompact + PostToolUse hooks, lossless tool-result codec (ANSI strip + JSON minify + blank-collapse + trailing marker + data-shape guard + schema-tag prefix + break-even guard), and a 4-arm token benchmark. Fail-open on every path. Run bench/bench.py for measured numbers.

Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: kerby
entry.content: kerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

entry.title: token-economy
entry.content: Cut INPUT/orchestration tokens for multi-agent work, plus output discipline for the main thread. Mechanisms: discover-once context-pack (single repo scan, file:line map), terse read-only analysis lenses (no Edit/Write enforces read-only), a frugal output-style (result-first, no narration), a pluggable memory adapter (search-before/write-after, no races), and cap+cache. Complements caveman (output-style compression) — they stack.

entry.title: cc-fleet
entry.content: Run any model with an Anthropic- or OpenAI-compatible API (e.g. DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, MiniMax) — even your Codex subscription — as real Claude Code workflows, agent-team teammates, or one-shot subagents, driven exactly like native ones. Your main session's own auth is untouched (OAuth subscription or API key, either works); API-key providers bill the provider key via apiKeyHelper, while a Codex subscription bills through a local OAuth daemon — each worker receives its credential on demand, never through its env or argv. Requires the `cc-fleet` binary on PATH, installed separately.

entry.title: leerie
entry.content: Deterministic, headless task orchestrator for Claude Code. Classifies a task, decomposes it into granular subtasks, schedules them into dependency-ordered waves, and executes each in an isolated git worktree under an evidence-gated implement/validate loop. Runs entirely on the Claude Code CLI/subscription via `claude -p` workers.

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2523 (2026-06-30) — schema-lib archive/adr existence-guard dead-path 활성 + 10 ADR backfill (atomic Phase 2, CFP-2519 후속): check_doc_frontmatter.py REQUIRED + check_doc_section_schema.py REQUIRED_SECTIONS 에 "archive/adr" 키 확장-only 추가 — wrapper ADR(archive/adr/) 가 docs/adr-only 키로 silent skip 되던 existence-guard dead-path 활성. naive 활성 시 FAIL 할 10 ADR (frontmatter 1 = ADR-042-mc closing delimiter / section 9 = 116/117/118/122/127/128/129/132/133)을 3-way TYPE(안전 rename / 신규 섹션 from related_files / 상태 from frontmatter)으로 동일 PR HEAD tree 에 atomic backfill — 관련 ADR 류 섹션(127/128/129 ## 관련 + 133 ## 관련 ADR)은 보존 + 별도 ## 관련 파일 신설(의미오염 차단). 141 ADR 전수 PASS(fm/sec exit=0) 실측. consumer 무해(existence-guard). PATCH 6.59.3. + CFP-2519 (2026-06-30) — docs/adr→archive/adr dead-path 클래스 sweep (functional 3 + stale-ref 2, CFP-2515 후속, Phase 2): CFP-2515 가 adr-sunset-criteria.yml 단일 dead-gate 만 정정하며 남긴 동형 dead-path 클래스(wrapper ADR 이 사는 archive/adr/ 를 미점검하는 docs/adr-only path 패턴)의 잔여 sweep. wrapper 는 ADR 을 archive/adr/ 에 두고 consumer 는 docs/adr/ 를 써, docs/adr-only path 는 consumer 정상·wrapper-self 비대칭 dead-gate. CFP-2515/CFP-2491 확립 path-agnostic 해법((docs|archive)/adr alternation / 2-entry glob)을 적용. (A functional 3) decision-principle-vocabulary.yml on.paths archive/adr 2-entry glob + detect grep `^((docs|archive)/adr/ADR-.*\.md|...)` alternation + lib scripts/lib/check_decision_principle_vocabulary.py SCOPE_GLOBS archive/adr 1줄 추가(in_scope() 가 SCOPE_GLOBS 순회 → collect+in_scope 동시 정정, 단일-site). kst-timestamp-display.yml 동형 on.paths + grep alternation + lib scripts/lib/check_kst_timestamp.py SCOPE_GLOBS archive/adr 추가 + ★in_scope L113 standalone path.match 2-call(SCOPE_GLOBS 순회 아닌 하드코딩 → 2-site 필수, decision 과 비동형). phase-gate-mergeable.yml SECURITY_PATHS regex `/^(docs|archive)\/adr\/ADR-.*\.md$/` alternation(required check check-gate, fail-closed 보안강화 — wrapper archive/adr 보안 ADR 의 post-merge-fix fast-pass 우회 차단, cond3 진입가드 hasPostMergeFixLabel 한정이라 정규 lane 영향 0) + L199 주석. (B stale-ref 2) story-init.yml L851 ADR-027 링크 docs/adr→archive/adr(.github copy only — invariant-check CONSUMER_ONLY_WORKFLOWS 첫 entry parity-excluded, templates copy 는 docs/adr 유지 = consumer 정답, byte-identical 강요 안 함 분기 유지) + tier-downgrade-guard.yml L5 주석 path-agnostic. functional 3 + tier-downgrade templates copy byte-identical(diff -q 실측 4/4). 회귀테스트 tests/scripts/test_adr-path-dead-path-sweep.sh 신설 — symmetric mutation-kill + ★lib-exercise(green-but-dead 차단 핵심: workflow grep 단독 mutation 은 lib in_scope() 2차 차단 못 잡아 workflow-only 불완전 fix 를 green-pass → mutation-kill 을 lib in_scope 계층까지 end-to-end exercise) + #2514 asymmetric sed no-op trap 회피(diff -q no-op guard). 13/13 GREEN + 4-site 실파일 mutation-RED 실측(decision SCOPE_GLOBS / kst SCOPE_GLOBS / kst L113 / phase-gate SECURITY_PATHS 각각 RED 전환). schema-lib 서브클래스(check_doc_frontmatter.py + check_doc_section_schema.py — rglob Path(prefix).exists() dead-path, required check, archive 키 활성 시 10 기존 ADR schema FAIL 위험)는 131+ ADR backfill migration 선행 필요 → 별 follow-up 분리(안2 정직 축소). 4 불변 보존: warning-tier(ADR-060 continue-on-error)·required 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet)·byte-identical parity(ADR-005)·검사 의미 무변경(path scope 확장-only, ADR-024 §결정 A). 신규 ADR 0 / amendment 0(migration-drift dead-path bug-fix, 정책 무변경, CFP-2515/2491 동형 Story-only 선례) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.59.1 → 6.59.2 PATCH (workflow/lib path-filter dead-gate behavior 정정 = ADR-037 (d) script/template edit M, version-bump-self 게이트 expected=patch 산정 정합). marketplace sync 필수(version 6.59.1→6.59.2 + description = mirrored field 변경 → ADR-063 Amendment 10 Rule (a)). + CFP-2515 (2026-06-30) — adr-sunset-criteria.yml wrapper ADR-path dead-gate 정정 (docs/adr→path-agnostic, CFP-2491 동형, Phase 2): adr-sunset-criteria.yml 양 copy(.github + templates, byte-identical)가 ADR path-filter 를 docs/adr/ 로만 한정(on.paths L17 + detect grep L42 `^docs/adr/ADR-.*\.md$`)해, wrapper ADR 이 사는 archive/adr/ 를 미점검하던 dead-path 정정. CFP-2491 의 parallel-epic-conflict-check.yml 동형 path-agnostic 해법(`^(docs|archive)/adr/`)을 그대로 적용 — (D1) on.paths 2-entry glob list(docs/adr/ADR-*.md + archive/adr/ADR-*.md, platform alternation 불가) (D2) detect grep regex alternation `^(docs|archive)/adr/ADR-.*\.md$` + L43 grep -v 'ADR-RESERVATION.md' substring 무변경 보존(AC-5 양 path 면제) (D3) lib scope=workflow-only(scripts/lib/check_adr_sunset_criteria.py 무변경 — argv passthrough chain firsthand: workflow 가 changed-files 를 argv 전달 → thin wrapper verbatim → lib `paths=sys.argv[1:]` 라 L44 default glob CI-unreachable + Path(p) path-상대 read 로 archive ADR 정확 검사, silent dead-path 0). 회귀테스트 tests/scripts/test_adr-sunset-criteria-pathagnostic.sh 신설 — CFP-2491 #2514 asymmetric sed no-op trap 회피 symmetric mutation-kill(arc_orig=1 path-agnostic archive 매치 / sed (docs|archive)/adr→docs/adr mutate + diff -q no-op guard / arc_mutant=0 docs-only archive 미매치, arc_orig==1 && arc_mutant==0 일 때만 KILL) + AC-4 byte-identical parity diff -q + AC-5 RESERVATION 면제 + AC-6 layer 등가. warning tier(ADR-060 continue-on-error)·byte-identical parity(ADR-005 invariant-check)·RESERVATION 면제(ADR-070)·sunset 검사 의미(ADR-058 §결정1-3) 4 불변 보존. 신규 ADR 0 / amendment 0(migration-drift dead-path bug-fix, 정책 무변경, CFP-2491 동형 Story-only 선례) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.59.0 → 6.59.1 PATCH (workflow path-filter dead-gate behavior 정정 = ADR-037 (d) script/template edit M, version-bump-self 게이트 expected=patch 산정 정합). marketplace sync 비대상(plugin.json name/author 무변경, ADR-063 §13.N marketplace_sync_required:false). + CFP-2505 (2026-06-30) — frontend 품질게이트 표준 wire (ADR-136, Phase 2): WEB-033(escalation #2502, 미닫힌 CSS brace → lenient 빌더 보정 → portal 모달 position:static 추락) 실증 발 frontend 품질게이트 양층 차단. (D1 구조적 CSS lint) templates/github-workflows/css-lint.yml 신규 — stylelint(17.13.0 pin)+stylelint-config-standard(40.0.0 pin) supply-chain(lockfile+npm ci, @latest 금지) + job-level if:hashFiles(path-filter 금지, ADR-130 §결정4 permanent-pending 회피) + in-job EXIT0 이중보호 graceful + continue-on-error warning-tier(7일 green 후 required 승격은 별 follow-up) + effective-config self-check(--print-config floor null override 차단, ADR-127 축소불가 invariant 강제) + permissions:contents:read + discriminating test job. scripts/check-lint.sh run_{python,node,css}_lint() 함수추출(rule-of-three)+CSS 분기(외부 exit-code/--fix/--quiet 계약 무변경). consumer_applicable_workflows.txt += css-lint.yml(positive whitelist, manifest=graceful no-op 이라 closure 등재 불요). (D2 UI 실렌더) change-plan.md §8.7 UI 실렌더 검증 CONDITIONAL sub-section(§8.7.0 applicability 4 Y/N + jsdom 부적격 명시 + computed-style 단언 layout-result 속성 포함 권장) + story-page-structure §8.7 미러 + check_doc_section_schema.py §8.7 lint(§8.6 의도적 gap allow). (flag) project-config-schema.md frontend.applicable:bool default false(안전, additive-only) + consumer-guide frontend 품질게이트 도입 안내. QADev anti-theater discriminating fixture(미닫힌 brace exit≠clean / floor default≠null-override / §8.7 Y-with-871≠Y-without-871) RED→GREEN 실증. plugin sibling = codeforge-design 0.30.0(§8.7) + codeforge-develop 0.12.0(.stylelintrc preset). 신규 required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.58.0 → 6.59.0 MINOR (신규 consumer-facing 품질게이트 surface = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2506 (2026-06-30) — Rust consumer 로컬빌드 toolchain 표준 (escalation #2503, Phase 2): Windows Rust consumer 의 링커/binutils(as.exe/dlltool/gcc) 부재로 인한 로컬 cargo build/test 불가 → CI 권위 단일화 피드백 지연을 문서화된 로컬빌드 경로 표준으로 단축(CI=검증 권위 보존, 로컬=보강·순수 가산). 신규 consumer-facing surface — (D1) docs/consumer-guide.md §1q Docker rust-image 마운트 빌드(--user/CARGO_TARGET_DIR 분리/named volume/rust:1-slim multi-arch/공통-부모 sibling 마운트 R-4) + build-verification↔artifact-equivalence 분별선(R-3 — linux ELF proxy ≠ Windows PE 동등) (D2) templates/scripts/build-local.{sh,ps1} 2-stage degrade(cargo check 링커-less 1차 → Docker/native 완전빌드 → graceful degrade exit0, workspace 자동감지, 경로 quote injection-safe) + consumer-scripts.manifest 등재(dependent-workflow 미부착=ad-hoc CLI, bootstrap Stage 7 자동 mirror) (D3) MSYS2(mingw-w64-toolchain)/MSVC(VS Build Tools)/WSL2 toolchain 가이드 + CI 권위 ABI 일치 선결(무조건 MSVC 금지 R-5) + examples/rust-cli-minimal/(비-Copy String partial-move 로 cargo check 실효 실증 + Dockerfile fixture). domain-knowledge 2(rust-local-build-equivalence R-1~R-5 + toolchain-decoupled-local-build-path concept) + ADR-033 Amendment 1(Docker-first 적용면 codify, §결정 1-7 본문 무변경). 요구사항리뷰 외부사실 8/8 corroborated + 구현리뷰 P2 2건(exit-code parity F-CR-001 + README 경로 F-CR-002) FIX iter1 + 보안테스트 injection/secret/container clean. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-033 Amd1) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.57.0 → 6.58.0 MINOR (신규 consumer onboarding 표준 = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2491 (2026-06-30) — ADR-RESERVATION atomic claim 강제 구현 (Epic CFP-2481 E3b): ADR-133 §결정2 단일-셀 OCC(Contents API PUT sha→409) 동작 구현 + race-guard mutation-RED 14/0. adr-reservation-atomic-claim.py(매 attempt N re-read+N+1 재계산) + dead-gate 비대칭 fix(.github archive/adr/, templates 무변경) + stale-reclaim cron(단조성 ABA-safe) + ADR-133 Amendment 1. 신규 required 0 / 6-tuple 무변경. 6.56.0 → 6.57.0 MINOR. marketplace sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2490 Phase 2 (2026-06-30) — sentinel blockable-capable(SENTINEL_TIER, warning 유지) + force-push pre-flight 2-layer 가드 (Epic CFP-2481 E2). 6.55.2 → 6.56.0 MINOR (신규 force-push-base-advance-check governance lint workflow + 신규 scripts = ADR-037 (d) workflow 신설(A)=minor; version-bump-self 게이트 verdict=MINOR 따름, PATCH 6.55.3 = under-bump FAIL). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2488 Phase 2 (2026-06-30) — playbook §4.5 Story-level 병렬 dispatch 운영절차 (Epic CFP-2481 E1, ADR-134 lookup-mirror). + CFP-2493 (2026-06-30) — wire-branch-protection HTTP-error guard hotfix (Epic CFP-2468 Track W/W1, CFP-2469 산출물 hotfix): gh 404 PR-body-proxy 한계 명시 (실 spawn prompt 아닌 proxy, transcribe 케이스만 검출) → warning-tier advisory (위조 false-PASS 구조적 가능, 보안 통제 신뢰 금지). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변) + label-registry-v2 v2.98 MINOR (hotfix-bypass:spawn-prompt-fact-verify 115번째 family member, 1-W name 충돌 회피). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.33.0 → 6.34.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2382 (2026-06-20) — issue-body-claim-pre-screen 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 20 §결정 15, CFP-1559 carrier): orchestrator-authored followup Issue body 안 4 sub-pattern (PR state / CFP state / count / sister carrier) stale-claim 을 동일-line [verified-via:] annotation presence 로 write-time pre-screen (warning-tier). Wave 1 declarative anchor(CFP-1559)의 Wave 2 wire. check_issue_body_claim_pre_screen.py Python SSOT (line-by-line in_fence toggle masking + inline code-span strip — fenced 내부 빈줄 fragmentation 0, ReDoS-safe anchored regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow (on:issues opened/edited, R1 scope predicate = codeforge-improvement AND (type:improvement OR title [CFP-FU/[CFP][FU), story-init.yml 답습) + self-contained discriminating test (23 TC, mutation 생존 0). count enum 한글 확장 (건/개/곳/줄/회/어휘 — ordinal-모호 번/항목/차례 제외, FP 보수) + 구조화 FLAG message (pattern/line/claim/hint). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.32.0 → 6.33.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2381 (2026-06-20) — deferred-followup reconcile 게이트 (ADR-060 Amendment 18 §결정 32): §결정 19 auto_blocking 라벨의 mechanical forcing function 신설. '임계 초과 + auto_blocking + 전용 carrier 부재' evidence-checks-registry entry 자동 검출 + 강제 action 3택 (배선/강등/폐기, warning-tier). carrier-부재 = detect_command OR workflow 경로 파일 ABSENT (닫힌집합 + fail-loud 경로추출, status-agnostic broad criterion, 2-root parity). self-validation test job (다형 fixture mutation 생존 0) + STALE 2 status flip (bootstrap-labels-precondition + schema-change-7-principles-self-check) + 16번째 registry self-entry. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.31.0 → 6.32.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2377 (2026-06-20) — 완료 단계 정식화 (ADR-128 + ADR-040 Amd9 + ADR-045 Amd13): merge 직후 wrap-up 을 정식 '완료 단계' 로 격상. (갭 A) backstop GC 자동 트리거 복원 = hooks.json SessionEnd async dispatch 단일 wire (hooks/session-end → check-worktree-stale.sh background GC, 문서-실배선 drift 복원 — SessionStart async 무시·동기 지연 회귀라 배제, 트리거 단일화 invariant = Stop 동시 wire 금지) + phase:완료 worktree-clean self-check 신규 (scripts/check-worktree-completion-clean.sh, eager 미실행 검출 게이트, F2 sub-worktree vs Story root mergedAt 구분 계약, fail-safe 4종 상속, warning-tier + workflow:null local-only — required CI 불가). (갭 B) 4-트리거 (post-merge-followup / retro-mandatory / GitOpsAgent eager / phase:완료) 수렴 SSOT = playbook §9.7.2 명문화 (신규 SSOT 0, 클라우드↔로컬 비대칭 = 절차+텔레메트리 조합). entry.title: trtc-agent-skills

entry.title: dte-skills
entry.content: dte-* orchestration skills that compose the existing toolchain (Augment context retrieval, intent-engineering, compound-engineering, layered-rails, majestic, ponytail, cubic, MemPalace) for architectural review, planning, deep review, test-quality audit, the full review-plan-work-review cycle, tooling scans, autonomous gated loops, UX/front-end, full-stack features, performance, specs, security sweeps, debugging, and migrations. Each skill can loop over a list of targets.

entry.title: prism
entry.content: Whole-repo code navigation (the prism-mcp server) plus defect-focused diff slicing, packaged for coding agents. Pre-wires the prism MCP server to the current project and ships two Agent Skills (prism-code-navigation, prism-code-slicing) that teach an agent when and how to use them.

entry.title: smooth-ai-review
